description: Retrieval evaluation set. Each item lists the question and the source document(s) that genuinely contain the answer. If you swap in your own documents, edit `relevant_sources` (and optionally `keywords`) to match. Metrics are computed at the source-document level plus an optional keyword check.

questions.question: What architecture did the 'Attention Is All You Need' paper introduce?
How does BERT pre-train language representations?
What are the two unsupervised tasks used to pre-train BERT?
What is few-shot learning as described in the GPT-3 paper?
How many parameters does the GPT-3 model have?
What improvements does Llama 2 make over the previous version?
How was Llama 2-Chat fine-tuned for dialogue use cases?
What two types of memory does the RAG model combine?
Why do Transformers use positional encodings?
How does in-context learning avoid gradient updates in GPT-3?
